list.title: Invoices
list.description: Track billing, payment updates, and total revenue.
list.resultsDescription: Review invoices and keep payment status up to date.

summary.title: Total revenue
summary.description: Revenue returned from the invoices stats endpoint.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter invoices by payment status, date, or date range.

form.title: Create invoice
form.description: Add a new invoice for a patient.

errors.pay: Unable to mark the invoice as paid.
errors.pdf: Unable to download the invoice PDF.
errors.stats: Unable to load the revenue summary.

validation.singleCareEvent: Use either appointment ID or admission ID, not both.

states.loadingDescription: Please wait while invoice data is loading.
states.emptyDescription: Create the first invoice to start tracking billing.
states.emptyFilteredDescription: Try another status, date, or clear the filter.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access invoices.
